purpose: Record the focused Ranged Combat sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.scope: This sub-bucket covers Opportunistic Shooter and Mighty Throw.
policy.reactionContext: Ranged opportunity/reaction attacks are stored as reaction metadata only until the combat/reaction workflow supplies the exact trigger, target legality, and line of sight/effect context.
policy.thrownWeaponContext: Thrown-weapon feat metadata must not broadly mutate ranged attacks. Apply attack or damage changes only after a workflow confirms a thrown-weapon attack packet.

implementedEntries.name: Opportunistic Shooter
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores ranged opportunity-shot reaction metadata and matching attack-option metadata for future reaction workflows.

implementedEntries.name: Mighty Throw
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores thrown-weapon ranged attack metadata. No broad ranged attack or damage mutation is applied without confirmed thrown-weapon context.
